title: Veterinary Drugs - Canada.ca
content:
Health Canada's Veterinary Drugs Directorate (VDD) is committed to transparency and public involvement which is integral to decision-making and providing quality service. To this end, VDD has established a Public Involvement Policy for the Veterinary Drugs Directorate.
Recognizing that an innovative organization needs to consult and take into consideration other points of view on key issues, the aim is to foster a consultative culture with our Advisory Committees and stakeholders.
- Technical Discussions on Veterinary Drugs Regulatory Modernization
